## File

`designs/{brand}/DESIGN.md`

## Issue Type

- [ ] Incorrect value (wrong hex, wrong size, etc.)
- [ ] Missing token or component
- [ ] Accessibility issue (contrast failure, missing ARIA, etc.)
- [ ] Outdated (site has changed since extraction)
- [ ] Typo or formatting

How do you know this is more accurate?
